docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,557.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY V ROY LEFCOURT ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT AHMAD J SLOAN.
